## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content performance, GEO strategies, and plan for next week's executive meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive trends with increased impressions and clicks for blog posts and glossary articles](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) efforts are yielding referral traffic and mentions in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Plans to showcase AI-driven content creation workflow to Abnormal's CEO and explore new channels like Reddit and newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Current content production capacity is around 20-25 articles per week, with potential to increase with API integration](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Blog posts: Impressions have increased significantly, with clicks expected to follow](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Glossary articles: 20% increase in impressions after refreshing content](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Volume: Over 41 blog posts and 44 glossary articles published recently](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [New ideation for glossary articles in progress, focusing on high-value terms](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) Strategies

  - [Monitoring prompts to identify content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Researching factors that make content more digestible for language models](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Updating content to reflect recent data and Abnormal's current branding](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Developing capability to scan website and flag outdated product descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [GrowthX uses a sophisticated AI-driven workflow for content research and creation](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Plans to showcase this process to Abnormal's CEO to demonstrate AI sophistication](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Potential to create a recording or presentation of the workflow for executive review](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Future Content Distribution Strategies

  - [Exploring Reddit as a platform for engaging with IT professionals and security managers](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Considering strategies for authentic engagement, possibly involving Abnormal employees](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Discussing potential for newsletter development to capitalize on increased traffic](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Aim to build a subscriber base for threat intelligence and security content](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### Content Production Capacity

  - [Currently producing about 20-25 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Anticipating increased efficiency with upcoming API integration](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Goal to consistently publish 15-20 articles weekly, up from previous 0-1 per week](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prepare presentation of content creation workflow for next week's meeting with Abnormal's VP](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Explore possibilities for Reddit engagement and newsletter development](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Share syndication list with GrowthX to analyze current content distribution channels](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Invite Ryan (Abnormal VP) to future in-person events in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and reporting on content performance and GEO results](https://fathom.video/share/23ZcHoV1rDmEyrARCehWZsU2JBPh8Bs8?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
